title: Stigmatodon andaraiensis
taxonomy: Stigmatodon andaraiensis is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as orchids. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other orchid species. Within the Orchidaceae family, Stigmatodon andaraiensis is further classified within the subfamily Vanilloideae. The genus Stigmatodon is a small group of orchids that are native to the Americas, and Stigmatodon andaraiensis is one of the species within this genus. The classification of Stigmatodon andaraiensis provides valuable information about its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants.
